# Brand description

Brand: GRPL

Description: GRPL is a strategic growth consultancy providing fractional executive-level growth leadership for scaling businesses. GRPL works with founders, CEOs, and leadership teams to align strategy, brand, marketing, and execution.

- Fractional CMO

- Growth strategy

- Brand positioning

- Go-to-market strategy

- Marketing transformation

- Strategic planning
